title: View-mode info popover fixture
description: Item A carries a name, notes, and a headerLink so the view-mode info popover (ADR 0012) has content to render. The rectangle / text box / floating labels carry notes so the hover popover's notes parity across every element type is coverable; info-label-b has a nonzero offset so chip-anchored placement is coverable. PLACEMENT CONSTRAINT: keep the wedge to the screen-RIGHT of item A's tile (0,0) — roughly tiles with x-y in [1..5] and |x+y| <= 3 — free of notes-bearing elements: the pinned popover (and its X button) renders there, and the real mouse rests on the X after closing, so anything with notes underneath would hover-reopen the popover and break the close assertions.

rectangles.name: Zone A
rectangles.notes: Rectangle runbook: keep the write path inside this zone.

labels.notes: Label notes: the chip itself carries these.
Offset label notes: anchored at the chip.

icons.name: fixture
